switcher.title: Who’s using this?
switcher.emptyUsers: No users on this device yet. Ask the store owner to enroll this device.
switcher.idleLocked: Locked after sitting idle. Your work is safe.

pin.title: Enter PIN
pin.attemptsLeft: {count, plural, one {# try left} other {# tries left}}
pin.lockedOut: PIN locked. Ask the store owner to unlock it.
pin.forgot: Forgot your PIN? Ask the store owner to set a new one.

setup.title: Create a New PIN
setup.mismatch: The PINs don’t match. Try again.

enroll.title: Enroll This Device
enroll.instruction: Sign in with your account. This device will be enrolled for your store.
enroll.needsConnection: Enrolling a device needs an internet connection.

revoked.title: Device Revoked
revoked.body: This device has been revoked and can no longer be used. Contact the store owner to enroll it again.
